title: Job Openings at Izy Global Partners
content:
Izy Global Partners LLP is a premium professional services firm based in Abuja, providing high-level advisory services across multiple sectors including legal, finance, and private client services. Our focus is on delivering efficient, discreet, and high-quality support to a diverse client base.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Personal Assistant & Operations Coordinator

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full Time 

About the Role
     

            
    




	An executive leading across business, ministry, philanthropy, and family initiatives is seeking an operational right hand.
	This is not a traditional admin role: you will run task trackers, follow through on delegated work, coordinate projects and events, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.
	The ideal candidate creates order, anticipates needs, follows through relentlessly, and enjoys making a busy leader more effective.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support:


	Manage calendars, appointments, reminders, and important dates (birthdays, gifts, family events, commitments).
	Coordinate personal errands, family logistics, and household administration (vendors, maintenance schedules, repairs, renewals).


Operations and Projects:


	Maintain task trackers and dashboards; follow up on delegated tasks until completion.
	Coordinate projects, meetings, and events end to end (including ministry programmes, speaking engagements, photoshoots, and family celebrations).
	Prepare weekly and monthly reports.


SOG Foundation Humanitarian Programme:


	Plan and execute four quarterly outreaches per the approved annual plan: beneficiary identification and verification, procurement, logistics, volunteer coordination, and stakeholder liaison (hospitals, orphanages, community leaders).
	Maintain complete documentation per outreach: beneficiary registers, activity logs, photos, quarterly narrative reports, and financial reconciliations.
	Keep the humanitarian cashbook current and reconciled against budget; flag variances promptly. (No payment approval authority; all payments approved by the Sponsor.)
	Track beneficiary commitments (referrals, bill settlements) to completion.


Requirements


	Minimum 3 years of experience as a PA, EA, Operations Coordinator, or Project Coordinator.
	Exceptional organisation, attention to detail, and follow-through.
	Strong written and verbal communication; high discretion and confidentiality.
	Able to manage multiple projects and stakeholders independently.
	Proficient in Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Canva, and task management tools.
	Basic bookkeeping or expense-tracking ability (cashbook, budget reconciliation).
	Comfortable in a faith-based environment; experience with community or nonprofit programmes is a strong advantage.


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 Monthly.

Application Closing Date: 17th August, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short cover note to: [email protected] using “EA / OPs — [Your Name]” as subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

2.) Driver 

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Description


	The Driver is responsible for all official vehicle movements for Izy Global Partners LLP;transporting the Founder and Chair, partners, associates, and approved clients safely, reliably, and to a standard consistent with the firm's premium positioning.
	This role serves an Ultra High Net Worth clientele and senior executives. The standard of service must reflect that at all times.


Key Responsibilities


	Transport the Founder and Chair, partners, senior staff, and approved clients for all official firm movements,court appearances, client meetings, airport transfers, and business engagements;safely, professionally, and on time
	Maintain the firm's vehicle in excellent condition at all times: cleanliness, servicing, fuel management, and prompt reporting of any mechanical issues
	Maintain an accurate trip log including destinations, mileage, and time records for all journeys
	Manage all vehicle documents;insurance, road worthiness certificate, and registration papers,ensuring all are current at all times
	Collect and deliver documents, packages, and correspondence on behalf of the firm as directed by the Administration Manager
	Provide airport pickup and drop-off services for the Founder and Chair, clients, and visiting guests while maintaining punctuality and discretion at all times


Requirements


	Valid Nigerian driver's licence,mandatory; must be current and clean
	Minimum 2 years of professional driving experience, preferably in a corporate, professional services, or executive transport environment
	Excellent knowledge of Abuja roads and routes; ability to plan efficient routes for multiple stops
	Calm, patient, and professional demeanour at all times,particularly in heavy traffic or time-pressured situations
	Absolute discretion,the Driver transports the firm's most senior people and its most important clients. Non-disclosure is a condition of employment.
	Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge: ability to change a tyre, check oil and coolant, and identify common mechanical warning signs
	Ability to use Google Maps and GPS navigation
	Smart personal presentation at all times.


Application Closing Date: 13th August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and brief cover letter (no more than one page) explaining your experience and why you are right for this role to: [email protected] using “Driver Application — [Your Full Name]” as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Cleaner (Office)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 

Key Responsibilties
Daily Cleaning Duties:


	Clean and maintain all office spaces daily including workstations, floors, surfaces, windows, and common areas to an immaculate standard
	Clean and sanitise all meeting rooms before and after every use, including wiping surfaces, arranging furniture, and ensuring the room is ready for the next client meeting
	Clean and maintain all bathrooms and kitchen areas including restocking soap, hand towels, and consumables as needed
	Sweep, mop, and vacuum all floor areas every morning before staff arrive and as required throughout the day
	Empty all bins and waste receptacles daily and dispose of waste in accordance with the firm’s guidelines
	Dust and wipe all surfaces, shelves, equipment, and furniture on a regular schedule


Standards & Presentation:


	Ensure the reception area and all client-facing spaces maintain the firm’s premium presentation standard at all times, including immediately before client arrivals
	Monitor and report any maintenance issues such as damaged fixtures, plumbing problems, or equipment faults to the Administration Manager promptly
	Manage cleaning supplies and consumables, monitor stock levels and report when replenishment is needed
	Handle all firm property, documents, and equipment with the utmost care, nothing on desks or in meeting rooms is to be moved, read, or disturbed beyond what is necessary for cleaning
	Maintain all cleaning equipment in good working order and store it correctly at all times.


Application Closing Date 24th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and brief cover note to: [email protected] using “Office Cleaner” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Summary


	We are looking for a competent, detail-oriented, and experienced Accountant to join our growing team.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare accurate monthly and annual financial reports.
	Prepare and analyze:
	
		Statement of Profit or Loss
		Statement of Financial Position

	Process payroll accurately and in a timely manner.
	Prepare and file monthly VAT returns and ensure compliance with all statutory tax obligations.

	Prepare annual budgets and support management in financial planning and forecasting.
	Liaise with external auditors and prepare all necessary schedules and documentation for audit exercises.

	Manage accounts payable and maintain good working relationships with vendors and suppliers.
	Perform bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies and applicable accounting standards.
	Provide financial analysis and recommendations to support management decision-making.

	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of proven experience in an accounting role.
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or ATS) will be an added advantage.
	Proficiency in QuickBooks and other accounting software.
	Strong knowledge of payroll administration, VAT filing, budgeting, and financial reporting.
	Experience working with external auditors.
	Excellent analytical, numerical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail and a high level of integrity.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Accountant Job at Kojo Auto Service Centre Limited




        
    

        
        Kojo Auto Service Centre Limited is an automotive service organization providing vehicle maintenance, diagnostics, mechanical repairs electrical repairs, AC overhaul, body and painting, tyre services, car wash, spare parts sales, and customer support services.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a competent, detail-oriented, and experienced Accountant to join our growing team.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare accurate monthly and annual financial reports.
	Prepare and analyze:
	
		Statement of Profit or Loss
		Statement of Financial Position
		Cash Flow Statement
	
	
	Process payroll accurately and in a timely manner.
	Prepare and file monthly VAT returns and ensure compliance with all statutory tax obligations.
	Maintain accurate accounting records using QuickBooks and other accounting software.
	Prepare annual budgets and support management in financial planning and forecasting.
	Liaise with external auditors and prepare all necessary schedules and documentation for audit exercises.
	Manage accounts receivable and interface with customers to ensure prompt debt collection.
	Manage accounts payable and maintain good working relationships with vendors and suppliers.
	Perform bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies and applicable accounting standards.
	Provide financial analysis and recommendations to support management decision-making.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of proven experience in an accounting role.
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or ATS) will be an added advantage.
	Proficiency in QuickBooks and other accounting software.
	Strong knowledge of payroll administration, VAT filing, budgeting, and financial reporting.
	Experience working with external auditors.
	Excellent analytical, numerical, and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail and a high level of integrity.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to [email protected] using "Application for Accountant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Facility Manager Job at Zinajob Synergy




        
    

        
        Zinajob is an employment and recruitment platform operating in Nigeria, serving as a hub connecting  job seekers with open career opportunities across the country. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Facility Manager
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Oversee facility operations, maintenance, safety compliance, and inventory/vendor management to keepHipTV'sstudio and office running smoothly.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage studio/office facility maintenance, repairs, and vendor relationships
	Oversee equipment and supplies inventory management and periodic audits
	Ensure health, safety, and regulatory compliance across all premises
	Manage the facility budget and control costs
	Supervise admin/facility support staff
	Coordinate space planning and logistics for productions and events


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Facility Management, Business Administration, or related field
	3+ years of facility or admin management experience
	Strong vendor negotiation and budget management skills
	Working knowledge of safety and regulatory standards.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

Inventory Manager Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited -  Our client, a reputable organization in the FMCG sector, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Inventory Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Inventory Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring inventory accuracy, maintaining stock integrity, and overseeing inventory control processes across assigned warehouses.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Oversee inventory transactions and ensure stock accuracy across assigned warehouses
	Conduct stock reconciliations, cycle counts, and investigate inventory discrepancies
	Prepare inventory reports and monitor inventory performance against KPIs
	Collaborate with Warehouse, Sales, Procurement, Finance, and Logistics teams to maintain inventory accuracy
	Drive inventory control improvements and support operations across assigned locations


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field
	Must have 3–5 years of experience in Inventory Management, Warehouse Operations, or Supply Chain within the FMCG, Manufacturing, or Distribution sector
	Strong knowledge of inventory control, stock reconciliation, warehouse operations, and inventory reporting
	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and experience using ERP systems (Business Central, Odoo, SAP, or similar)


Salary
Open to Negotiation    

    

        Click here to Apply
